description: Our AI system makes automated decisions about loan approvals without any human review. The system processes applicant data including credit scores, employment history, and demographic information to instantly approve or deny loans.
notes: Solely automated decision with legal effects, no human review

description: We have a user data deletion feature that allows users to request deletion of their account. Once requested, we delete the user's profile data within 30 days and notify all third-party services we shared data with.
notes: Proper implementation of right to erasure

description: User passwords are stored in plain text in our database for easier account recovery. We use HTTPS for data transmission but don't encrypt data at rest.
notes: Major security violation - plain text passwords

description: Our financial reporting system has automated controls that prevent unauthorized journal entries. We conduct quarterly internal control assessments and maintain documentation of all control activities.
The CEO reviews and signs off on all financial statements. We maintain records of these reviews and any corrections made before filing with the SEC.
We log database queries but don't track who made changes to financial records. Our audit logs are stored for 90 days before being automatically deleted.
Our AI system is used for hiring decisions in a large corporation. We have implemented human oversight, logging, and transparency measures. Candidates are informed about the AI's role in the process.
We use AI to manipulate user behavior through subliminal techniques that they cannot perceive. This helps maximize engagement on our social media platform.
Our chatbot clearly identifies itself as an AI system at the start of each conversation. Users are informed they are interacting with an automated system and can request human assistance at any time.
